model_binding.server_policy: derive protocol adapters from Worker Definition

root_cause.wasm: The Web protobuf descriptors had field 6 while the loaded WASM package had been built before the proto update. Prost discarded the unknown request and response fields.
root_cause.response: After the WASM rebuild, the service filtered ModelBinding rows correctly but the Connect handler returned the pre-policy filter, whose protocol adapter list was empty.

repairs: Rebuilt do-worker-wasm after Rust proto generation.
Added ResourceListPage.AppliedFilter and populated it after server-side Worker Definition policy resolution.
Returned the resolved filter from ListResources and covered the response contract in Connect tests.
Required every config document definition to declare required explicitly.

browser_verification.result: QA Primary Model (r1) remained selectable through the openai-compatible policy.
The ModelBinding selector was disabled with no available resources; QA Primary Model (r1) was absent and no protocol-filter error was rendered.
openclaw-json rendered without a required marker and no missing-config warning.
settings rendered with a required marker; validation reported that settings requires a configuration bundle and disabled Generate Plan.

support_claim: This is a configuration and reference-selection contract verification only. It does not promote any Worker to externally provider-verified support.
